title: Trump Threatens Oman Over the Strait, Then Says, ‘They’ll Be Fine.’
summary_full: President Trump said there would be serious repercussions if Iran and Oman move forward with a deal to open the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: President Trump said there would be serious repercussions if Iran and Oman move forward with a deal to open the Strait of Hormuz.
